description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a rounded, bulging midsection and reinforced by two prominent dark metal hoops, one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood staves are vertically aligned, showing a natural grain and weathered texture, giving the barrel an aged, rustic appearance. A single, rounded wooden spigot protrudes from one side, suggesting the barrel is designed to dispense liquids. The top is closed with a flat wooden surface, and there are no visible openings or removable lids. The metal bands are fastened with visible rivets, adding to the structural integrity and visual detail. The overall look is utilitarian and robust, suitable for storage or dispensing in urban or semi-industrial settings.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with metal hoops and a side spigot, featuring a rustic, robust design and closed top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's bulging shape, wood grain, and the side spigot clearly visible on the left.
description_view_1: Side view with the spigot not visible, highlighting the curvature and metal hoops of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the spigot now visible on the right, showing the same wood and metal details.
description_view_3: Rear view with the spigot facing forward, metal hoops and rivets clearly visible, emphasizing the dispensing feature.
